## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve, or what opportunity does it unlock?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see built.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Relevant Polymarket API endpoints

If you know which Polymarket API powers this feature, list them:

- `data-api.polymarket.com/...`
- `gamma-api.polymarket.com/...`
- `clob.polymarket.com/...`

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, or other references.
